chain.thought: Explanation: Counting the occurrences of each builder shows: Hawthorn Leslie appears 21 times (rows 6, 19–38), Peckett 17 times (rows 39–48, 56–62), Andrew Barclay 16 times (rows 11–18, 52–55, 64–67), Manning Wardle 5 times (rows 1–5), Bagnall 3 times (rows 9, 10, 49), Hudswell Clarke 2 times (rows 8, 50), and others 1 time. Therefore, Hawthorn Leslie built more than any other builder.
